synergy: Your engage/CC: Gadget Security Gate (root 1s), Grux Crush (knockup 0.5s). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
You have sustain (Phase) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Security Gate root → Sticky Mine → Tesla Dome zone ult
ourKits.winCondition: root with the gate and trap a fight inside the Tesla Dome
ourKits.passive: FDA stacks grant scaling magical power
ourKits.playWith: frontline that holds enemies in her Dome
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge the gate; spread vs the Dome — she's immobile, dive her

ourKits.combo: Energy Shield block → Displacement Blast → Assault Mode → GTFO lockon ult
ourKits.winCondition: out-trade with Pulsefire and the spell-shield, finish with GTFO
ourKits.playWith: peel so he can free-cast in Assault Mode
ourKits.playAgainst: bait Energy Shield, then commit; dodge GTFO's slow channel

ourKits.combo: Ascend dive → Heaven's Fury multi-strike → Chastise slow → Heresy form ult, resets on takedowns
ourKits.winCondition: dive the backline and snowball Heresy resets
ourKits.playWith: a frontline that creates her dive angle
ourKits.playAgainst: peel the backline — deny the first kill and her resets dry up

ourKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
ourKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
ourKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
ourKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
ourKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

ourKits.combo: Smash 'n Grab pull → Crush knockup → Warlord's Challenge stun → bleed-stacked basics
ourKits.winCondition: land the pull→knockup chain to lock a target while bleed and AS shred them
ourKits.passive: basics stack a bleed for sustained damage
ourKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his knockup/stun window
ourKits.playAgainst: telegraphed engage — bait Crush/Pull, then punish; kite his slow start

enemyKits.combo: Assault The Gates leap → Make Way armor shred → Sacred Oath empowered basic → Stone Forged Soul stasis ult
enemyKits.winCondition: front-line aggressively and reset the fight with the stasis heal
enemyKits.playWith: a team that fights while he soaks and stasis-resets
enemyKits.playAgainst: don't waste burst into his stasis — wait it out; anti-heal cuts the ult heal

enemyKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
enemyKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
enemyKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
enemyKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

enemyKits.combo: Lash Kick gap-close+slow → Windburn %hp basics → Backlash push, Quelling Gale to disengage
enemyKits.passive: Rising Storm stacks grant attack speed
enemyKits.playWith: a team that lets her side-lane and pick
enemyKits.playAgainst: she wants 1v1s — group and burst her; Quelling Gale only stops projectiles

enemyKits.combo: Void Breach slow → Cosmic Rift → Black Hole on the grouped enemies
enemyKits.winCondition: land Black Hole / Cosmic Rift on a clumped team for AoE burst
enemyKits.passive: an ability-empowered basic tethers a target for bonus damage
enemyKits.playWith: hard engage that clumps enemies into his Black Hole
enemyKits.playAgainst: immobile with long cooldowns — dodge the skillshots and dive him once Black Hole is down

enemyKits.combo: Stasis Bomb stun → Photon Disruptor slow → Containment Fence wall → Ion Strike slow ult
enemyKits.winCondition: lock a target with stun + fence and let the team collapse
enemyKits.passive: Rocket Boots mobility, refreshed by abilities
enemyKits.playWith: burst that converts her stun/fence into a kill
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge Stasis Bomb; the fence zones — flank around it

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over timeline majors (older film — no tower times; Fang/Prime/Orb only); itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
